fields.description: A logged-in user can delete one of their notes; the note disappears from the list after confirming the dialog.

step.raw: Log in as the seeded demo user.
step.rendered: Log in as the seeded demo user.

step.raw: Create a note so there is one to delete.
step.rendered: Create a note so there is one to delete.

result.raw: The note appears in the notes list.
result.rendered: The note appears in the notes list.

step.raw: Click the note's Delete control and confirm in the dialog.
step.rendered: Click the note's Delete control and confirm in the dialog.

result.raw: The note is removed from the notes list.
result.rendered: The note is removed from the notes list.
